item.title: PowerMateReborn 2.0.0
item.description:
PowerMateReborn 2.0.0 -- Initial Release

A native macOS driver for the Griffin PowerMate USB, built from scratch for Apple Silicon and macOS Sequoia.

Volume Control

  • Multi-tier CoreAudio engine (Master, Channel, VirtualMaster, AppleScript, Software fallback)
  • Per-device audio routing memory -- remembers your preferred output device
  • Output device picker in the menu bar
  • Mute toggle, external volume change listener, L/R balance preservation

Brightness Control

  • DisplayServices private API for built-in Apple displays
  • DDC/CI hardware brightness for external monitors via native IOKit I2C
  • Hybrid DDC+Gamma mode for instant feedback with queued hardware changes
  • Gamma table and overlay dimming fallbacks for all other displays
  • Sync All Displays (default ON) -- all monitors dim together with relative offsets preserved
  • Night mode -- deep overlay dim to near-black for any display type
  • Per-display brightness preferences saved and restored automatically

MIDI Mode

  • Virtual CoreMIDI source ("PowerMate Knob") visible to any DAW
  • Knob rotation sends CC messages; button press sends note on/off
  • Configurable CC number (Mod Wheel, Volume, Expression, Filter) and channel (1-16)

Custom Mode

  • Per-application profiles -- the PowerMate adapts to whichever app is in the foreground
  • Global default profile for apps without a specific mapping
  • 6 action types: Scroll, Keyboard Shortcut, Media Control, MIDI CC, MIDI Note, OSC Message
  • Live keyboard shortcut recording from the settings window
  • Long Press override -- assign a custom action instead of mode cycling
  • Extended Press (hold-to-sustain) -- like an organ key, active while held, released on button up
  • OSC output over UDP with configurable path, host, and port

System

  • Pure IOKit HID driver -- no kernel extensions, no Rosetta
  • Lightweight menu bar app with mode-specific icons
  • Native macOS OSD overlay for volume and brightness
  • LED ring brightness follows current level in real time
  • Configurable sensitivity, LED effects (follow/static/pulse)
  • Launch at Login via SMAppService
  • Sparkle auto-updates with EdDSA signing
  • About window with device diagnostics
